build_system: npm with tsc for compilation, CDK CLI for synthesis
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform, aws-cdk-lib/assertions (Template.fromStack, Match). Uses jest-autoclean from aws-cdk-lib/testhelpers. Snapshot tests in test/__snapshots__/
verification_instructions: 1. npm ci (install deps), 2. npx jest (run tests), 3. npx cdk synth (synthesize CloudFormation)
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - auto-generated by Jest snapshot tests. Regenerate with: npx jest --updateSnapshot
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - npm install works. Node.js v22 available. No Docker daemon needed for this CDK project.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests FIRST, then minimal implementation. Conventional commits required. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated for any infrastructure changes. Prefer L2/L3 constructs. Follow AWS Well-Architected (least-privilege IAM, encryption). Run tests + cdk synth before pushing.
key_patterns: Single stack in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts using Template.fromStack() with describe blocks per resource group. CDK assertions use Match.objectLike, Match.arrayWith, Match.stringLikeRegexp. Snapshot test at end of test file. L2 constructs used throughout (s3.Bucket, sfn.StateMachine, tasks.CallAwsService). State machine uses DefinitionBody.fromChainable with .next() chaining. EventBridge rule targets SfnStateMachine.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry point, lib/ - stack definitions (cdk-base-stack.ts), test/ - Jest tests with __snapshots__/, .github/workflows/ - CI (ci.yml runs npm test + cdk synth)
